title: Sorting
user_story:
As a user\
On the overview pages\
I want to be able to sort the results\
So I can faster find what I am looking for
description:
* the already existing section with the search tools on the overview pages is extended
* a component is added to be able to **sort** the node collection
* the sort component allows the user to
  * select one of the official node properties (no matter if read-only, internal or something else)
  * select the sort direction → up/down
  * reset the sort settings
  * trigger the sorting
* when the user hacks the URL and provides an invalid node property as parameter then the requests is denied → Status Code `400`
* a valid request always returns with status code `200`
* the sorting is case-insensitive
* the component only has to support sorting by **one** property, but should be implemented in a way that it can easily be extended to support multiple sort parameters
* the other search components need to be updated accordingly 
  * e.g the pagination bar needs to now the sort settings to create the correct links
